additionalLaunchArgs: Additional arguments passed to the Puppeteer process
maxParallelProcessesHelp: Number of screenshots/PDFs rendered at the same time. On low-memory devices (e.g. Raspberry Pi) keep this at 1 to avoid running out of RAM.
webExtensionHint: When a web instance is selected, screenshots can be created via a GET request, e.g. http://<iobroker-ip>:8082/puppeteer-enhanced/screenshot?url=https://www.iobroker.net
webInstance: Web instance for the screenshot endpoint
webInstanceHelp: Select the web adapter instance that should provide the /puppeteer-enhanced/screenshot endpoint
